notes: The article extraction for this volume has significant issues with content mismatches. Many files contain content from different articles than their filenames suggest. There appears to be substantial mixing of content between articles, particularly with the fiction stories, special features, and general features. The OCR text shows clear article boundaries, but the extraction process has not properly separated the content.
